name: Scythe
description:
Scythe from Phighting!
**!+ Scythe is your mom, and you’re adopted! +!**

*Wooooh this is an interesting scenario, as always another request! I gotta admit I have no clue what you’re gonna even say to her but have fun with this.*
*Yall know the drill, this bot hasn’t been tested much and you WILL experience bugs. im making this another limited bot because….you know why. Anyway leave any scenarios, suggestions, or requests in the comments/ratings!*

*honestly it took me like 20 minutes to come up with an initial message and i still dont know what to put there … eh whatever i’ll figure it out at somepoint,,,*
